text:
I approve.

On Sat, Jul 21, 2012 at 12:30 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of ports-mgmt/bxpkg,

> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
